summary: All acceptance criteria for Issue #547 (Copilot CLI slash commands and selection window detection) are met. The implementation includes: (1) getCopilotBuiltinCommands() returning /model command with correct properties, (2) integration into both branches of getSlashCommandGroups(), (3) COPILOT_SELECTION_LIST_PATTERN for arrow-key navigation detection, (4) STATUS_REASON.COPILOT_SELECTION_LIST constant, (5) SELECTION_LIST_REASONS Set with all 3 tool reasons, (6) detectSessionStatus() Step 1.6 with cliToolId guard, (7) SELECTION_LIST_REASONS.has() in current-output/route.ts, and (8) comprehensive unit tests. All quality checks pass: TypeScript compilation (0 errors), ESLint (0 warnings/errors), and unit tests (5396 passed, 274 test files).
